title: Man-Mauji
writer: Madhusudhana Rao D., Narasa Raju D.V., Som Haksar
actors: Kishore Kumar, Sadhana Shivdasani, Kumari Naaz
plot: Raja's frequent brushes with crime force his sister Rani to disown him, and she decides to work in Dr. Mohan's house. However, Dr. Mohan finds out the truth about Rani and her brother.
